perItemFindings.label: S1
perItemFindings.one_line: `Causalean.Stat.IIDSample` requires an ℕ-indexed mutually independent process on one ambient measure, while S1 provides only the finite law `Measure.pi (Fin n → P)`; its finite coordinate process cannot itself be an `IIDSample` for arbitrary P.

verbatim_critique: Re-plan S1’s concentration/U-statistic bridge: either work directly on the finite product law, or explicitly add an infinite i.i.d. ambient product world and transport its first n coordinates to `Measure.pi (Fin n → P)` before applying `IIDSample` declarations. `Sample/PiTransport` only transports an already-given IIDSample to a finite product; it does not supply this missing finite-to-infinite view.
